title: Paleozoic Ore Fossilmon
description: Brand New Fossilmon Resurrected With Ores in Paleozoic Variants
body:
How to Install Download the latest version from Modrinth, and add the Folder to both "resourcepacks" folder and, when creating a world, to "datapacks" folder.

Discord addon link: https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1261567772828241920

For suggestions, teasers, and polls, check out this Discord thread: https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1261193541422551100

Adds Paleozoic Themed Ore Fossilmons that can be resurrected with Cobbled Deepslate & Ores.

It includes the following:

Dimebon/Dimetromond
Type: Ground/Fairy
Ore: Diamond
Paleozoic Creature: Dimetrodon
Evolve at Level 39

Edaberyl/Edaphorald
Type: Ground/Psychic
Ore: Emerald
Paleozoic Creature: Edaphosaurus
Evolve at Level 39

Diictodig/Lystrogold
Type: Ground/Fairy
Ore: Gold
Paleozoic Creature: Lystrosaurus
Evolve at Level 39

Temniron/Prionosteel
Type: Ground/Steel
Ore: Iron
Paleozoic Creature: Prionosuchus
Evolve at Level 39

Estemcu/Estemmenocopper
Type: Ground/Electric
Ore: Copper
Paleozoic Creature: Estemmenosuchus
Evolve at Level 39

Gorgorok/Inostranerite
Type: Ground/Dark
Ore: Netherite
Paleozoic Creature: Inostrancevia
Evolve at Level 39

Mosamber/Struthioresin
Type: Ground/Grass
Ore: Resin Brick (Dark Oak Sapling For Now)
Paleozoic Creature: Moschops
Evolve at Level 39

Arthropeater/Comparapede
Type: Ground/Electric
Ore: Redstone
Paleozoic Creature: Arthropleura
Evolve at Level 37

Tetrazuli/Tiktaalapis
Type: Ground/Fairy
Ore: Lapis Lazuli
Paleozoic Creature: Tiktaalik
Evolve at Level 37

Orthoquartz/Camerothyst
Type: Ground/Psychic
Ore: Amethyst
Paleozoic Creature: Orthocone
Evolve at Level 40

Pariartz/Scutoquartz
Type: Ground/Fire
Ore: Quartz
Paleozoic Creature: Scutosaurus
Evolve at Level 39

Lycoalpod/Lepidoniferous
Type: Ground/Fire
Ore: Coal
Paleozoic Plant: Lepidodendron
Evolve at Level 40

Casau/Cotylogold
Type: Ground/Fire
Ore: Nether Gold
Paleozoic Creature: Cotylorhynchus
Evolve at Level 39

Synamare/Anteodread
Type: Ground/Dark
Ore: Gilded Blackstone
Paleozoic Creature: Anteosaurus
Evolve at Level 39

Tulpris/Tulliguard/Tullimonguard
Type: Ground/Water
Ore: Prismarine Shards
Paleozoic Creature: Tullimonstrum
Evolve at Level 24 & Level 48

Erylure/Eryangler
Type: Ground/Water
Ore: Prismarine Crystals
Paleozoic Creature: Eryops
Evolve at Level 39

Weigon/Coelurowyvern
Type: Ground/Dragon
Ore: Glowstone Dust
Paleozoic Creature: Coelurosauravus
Evolve at Level 39

Trilobug/Trilotumble, Isobsi, or Wallisky
Type: Bug/Normal -> Bug/Rock, Bug/Ground, or Bug/Flying
Ore: Tumblestones
Paleozoic Creature: Trilobites, Isotelus, and Walliserops
Evolve using the types of tumblestones: Trilotumble (Tumblestone), Isobsi (Black Tumblestone), or Wallisky (Sky Tumblestone)
